hero.sub: With over 15 years of experience, I've worked alongside faith organizations — from complete rebrands to weekly print materials, curricula, and publishing. I understand the mission, the timeline, and what it takes to communicate it well.

services.title: Brand Identity & Visual Systems
services.description: Logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines — everything your team needs to communicate consistently across every platform.

services.title: Print & Editorial Layout
services.description: Booklets, prayer guides, handbooks, study materials, and curriculum — designed to be read, kept, and passed on.

services.title: Sermon Series Graphics
services.description: Series branding, social media packages, screen slides, and promotional assets — built for your cadence, consistent across every touchpoint.

services.title: Event Brand Identity
services.description: Visual identity for conferences, retreats, camps, and special services — a cohesive look that extends across print, digital, and on-site signage.

services.title: Book & Bible Design
services.description: Editorial design for Christian publishers — devotionals, study Bibles, curricula, and resources built to hold up across print runs and formats.

services.title: Web & Digital
services.description: Website layouts, app screen design, and digital assets — visual systems that translate from print to screen without losing integrity.

paragraphs: I'm Barbara Soriano, a brand and graphic designer based in Buenos Aires, Argentina, with over 15 years of experience helping churches and Christian organizations communicate with clarity through branding, editorial, print, and digital design.

My design journey began in my local church, where I discovered how thoughtful design can support ministry. Since then, I've worked with churches across the United States and Latin America, creating sermon series, event identities, books, discipleship resources, membership guides, and complete church rebrands.

For three years I was part of the Church Media Squad team, producing weekly creative content for U.S. churches. I've also worked with e625 for more than a decade, designing books, Bibles, curricula, and digital resources for ministries in over 20 countries. I don't just design for churches—I understand how they work.

testimonials.quote: "Bárbara understood exactly what we needed to communicate, and turned it into an identity we are proud of."
"She didn't just deliver a design — she delivered a language our whole team could speak."
"Working with Bárbara felt like having a creative director who truly understood our mission from day one."

contact.h2:
Have a project
in mind? Let's talk
about it.
contact.intro: I take on a limited number of projects at a time — so the work gets the attention it deserves.
